name: Subagents Catalog
description: Multi-agent frameworks, coding agents, orchestration platforms, and subagent collections

subagents.name: Claude Agent SDK
subagents.description: Official Anthropic SDK for building agentic applications with Claude. Supports tool use, multi-turn conversations, and structured outputs.

subagents.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
subagents.description: OpenAI's production-ready framework for building multi-agent systems with handoffs, guardrails, and tracing built in.

subagents.name: Google ADK
subagents.description: Google's Agent Development Kit for building, deploying, and orchestrating AI agents with Gemini models and tool integration.

subagents.name: Microsoft Agent Framework
subagents.description: Microsoft's comprehensive framework for building autonomous AI agents with Azure integration, semantic kernel, and .NET/Python support.

subagents.name: CrewAI
subagents.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents that collaborate to accomplish complex tasks. Supports sequential and parallel workflows.

subagents.name: LangGraph
subagents.description: Library for building stateful, multi-actor applications with LLMs using graph-based workflows. Powers complex agent orchestration patterns.

subagents.name: AutoGen
subagents.description: Microsoft's framework for building multi-agent conversations. Enables agents to collaborate and solve tasks through structured dialogue.

subagents.name: MetaGPT
subagents.description: Multi-agent framework that assigns different roles to GPTs to form a collaborative software entity for complex tasks.

subagents.name: Agno
subagents.description: Lightweight framework for building multi-modal agents with memory, tools, and reasoning. Optimized for speed and simplicity.

subagents.name: Smolagents
subagents.description: Hugging Face's minimal framework for building agents that write their own tool calls as code. Supports any LLM via API.

subagents.name: Pydantic AI
subagents.description: Agent framework built on Pydantic for type-safe, structured AI agent development with tool use and dependency injection.

subagents.name: LlamaIndex
subagents.description: Data framework for connecting LLMs with external data. Provides agents, RAG pipelines, and data connectors for knowledge-intensive tasks.

subagents.name: Mastra
subagents.description: TypeScript AI agent framework with tool use, memory, RAG, and workflow orchestration. Designed for full-stack JS/TS applications.

subagents.name: Vercel AI SDK
subagents.description: TypeScript toolkit for building AI-powered applications with streaming, tool use, and multi-provider LLM support.

subagents.name: OpenCode
subagents.description: AI coding agent that runs in your terminal with MCP support, multi-model routing, and autonomous task execution.

subagents.name: Claude Code
subagents.description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal. Understands your codebase, makes edits, runs commands, and manages git workflows.

subagents.name: OpenHands
subagents.description: Platform for developing AI agents that can edit code, run commands, and browse the web. Formerly OpenDevin.

subagents.name: Cline
subagents.description: VS Code extension for autonomous coding agents that can edit files, run commands, and browse the web with user approval.

subagents.name: Aider
subagents.description: AI pair programming in your terminal. Aider knows your entire git repo, makes changes, and commits them with sensible messages.

subagents.name: Goose
subagents.description: Block's open-source AI developer agent that extends your capabilities via MCP tools. Runs locally with full system access.

subagents.name: SWE-agent
subagents.description: Princeton AI agent that turns GitHub issues into pull requests. Excels at navigating real-world repositories and fixing bugs.

subagents.name: Continue
subagents.description: Open-source AI code assistant that connects to any LLM. Works as a VS Code/JetBrains extension with autocomplete and chat.

subagents.name: Kilo Code
subagents.description: AI-powered coding assistant fork of Cline with enhanced multi-model support and autonomous task execution capabilities.

subagents.name: OpenAI Codex
subagents.description: OpenAI's cloud-based coding agent that can implement features, fix bugs, and answer codebase questions from natural language.

subagents.name: Gemini CLI
subagents.description: Google's official CLI for Gemini-powered coding assistance. Supports file editing, code generation, and multi-turn conversations.

subagents.name: Roo Code
subagents.description: AI coding agent for VS Code with multi-model support, custom modes, and browser integration for autonomous development tasks.

subagents.name: awesome-claude-code-subagents
subagents.description: Curated list of Claude Code subagent configurations, custom slash commands, and agent workflows for autonomous development.

subagents.name: awesome-codex-subagents
subagents.description: Curated collection of OpenAI Codex CLI configurations, custom agents, and prompt engineering patterns.

subagents.name: cc-sdd
subagents.description: Claude Code subagent definitions for software design and development workflows. Includes role-specific agent prompts.

subagents.name: buildwithclaude
subagents.description: Collection of Claude Code subagents and automation templates for building production applications.

subagents.name: pm-claude-skills
subagents.description: Product management focused Claude skills and subagent configurations for PM workflows and stakeholder communication.

subagents.name: Claude-Code-Subagents-Collection
subagents.description: Open-source collection of reusable Claude Code subagent definitions for common development tasks.

subagents.name: fastagent-plugins
subagents.description: Plugin collection for multi-agent frameworks with pre-configured agent roles and tool integrations.

subagents.name: awesome-gemini-cli-subagents
subagents.description: Curated list of Gemini CLI subagent configurations and custom agent prompts for coding assistance.

subagents.name: LangSmith
subagents.description: LangChain's commercial platform for debugging, testing, evaluating, and monitoring LLM applications and agent workflows.

subagents.name: AgentOps
subagents.description: Open-source observability platform for AI agents. Provides session replay, cost tracking, and performance analytics.

subagents.name: Braintrust
subagents.description: AI evaluation and observability platform. Provides prompt playground, logging, and scoring for agent and LLM workflows.

subagents.name: Langfuse
subagents.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform. Provides tracing, prompt management, evaluation, and analytics for agent systems.

subagents.name: Arize Phoenix
subagents.description: Open-source observability tool for LLM applications. Provides tracing, evaluation, and experimentation for agent workflows.

subagents.name: Replit Agent
subagents.description: Cloud-based AI coding agent that builds, deploys, and manages full-stack applications from natural language descriptions.

subagents.name: GitHub Copilot Agent
subagents.description: GitHub's AI agent that can implement issues, create PRs, and handle code review with deep repository context.

subagents.name: Devin
subagents.description: Cognition AI's autonomous software engineer that can plan, code, debug, and deploy entire projects from prompts.

subagents.name: Factory AI
subagents.description: Enterprise AI agent platform for software development automation. Handles coding, testing, and deployment workflows.

subagents.name: Model Context Protocol
subagents.description: Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI agents to data sources, tools, and services via a unified interface.

subagents.name: Agent-to-Agent Protocol
subagents.description: Google's open protocol for agent interoperability. Enables agents built on different frameworks to discover and communicate with each other.

subagents.name: n8n
subagents.description: Open-source workflow automation platform with AI agent capabilities. Visual editor for building multi-step agent workflows.

subagents.name: Dify
subagents.description: Open-source LLM application development platform. Provides visual agent builder, RAG pipeline, and workflow orchestration.

subagents.name: Flowise
subagents.description: Open-source drag-and-drop tool for building multi-agent AI workflows. Visual interface for LLM chains, agents, and RAG.

subagents.name: mem0
subagents.description: Open-source memory layer for AI agents. Provides persistent, adaptive memory across sessions with user and session-level isolation.

subagents.name: Cognee
subagents.description: Open-source memory framework for AI agents using knowledge graphs. Enables semantic memory, retrieval, and reasoning.
